title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company Digital Technologies:
Titan Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company Digital Technologies!
